headline: Airbnb Selling $2.5 Billion of Bonds as Convertible Comes Due
summary: Bank of America Corp., Goldman Sachs Group Inc. and Morgan Stanley are managing the sale.  Proceeds will help fund general corporate purposes including the repayment of outstanding debt, Airbnb said in a filing.  The convertible note was issued during a flurry of such offerings during the pandemic from firms including Spotify Technology SA and Beyond Meat Inc.

headline: Had You Invested $1,000 in Airbnb or Uber 5 Years Ago, Here’s What You’d Have Now
summary: Gig economy giants Airbnb (NASDAQ: ABNB) and Uber (NYSE: UBER) both went public riding enormous consumer behavior shifts. Airbnb listed in December 2020 at the peak of pandemic-era travel reinvention. Uber has been public since May 2019, spending its early years hemorrhaging cash while critics questioned whether it could ever turn a profit. A few ...
